creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
> ====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
> Error: /usr/local/bin/okular is linked to /usr/local/lib/libKF5Crash.so.5 from devel/kf5-kcrash but it is not declared as a dependency
> Warning: you need USE_KDE+=crash
> Error: /usr/local/bin/okular is linked to /usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Concurrent.so.5 from devel/qt5-concurrent but it is not declared as a dependency
> Warning: you need USES=qt:5 and USE_QT+=concurrent
